itinerary.route: Villa Cerro Castillo to Laguna Desierta
itinerary.mapNote: Steep climb from Patagonian steppe to first views of the castle spires. 1550m.

itinerary.route: Laguna Desierta to Laguna Cerro Castillo
itinerary.mapNote: Glacier lagoon below the basalt towers. Icebergs calving constantly. 1400m.

itinerary.route: Laguna Cerro Castillo to Campamento Neozelandes
itinerary.mapNote: Cross Paso Cerro Castillo with full tower panorama. 1600m.

itinerary.route: Campamento Neozelandes to Villa Bahía Murta
itinerary.mapNote: Descend to Carretera Austral and General Carrera Lake. 200m.

waypoints.name: Cerro Castillo
waypoints.note: The castle — basalt spires hanging over a hanging glacier. Patagonia's hidden gem.

waypoints.name: Lago Cerro Castillo
waypoints.note: Turquoise glacial lake with calving ice from Glaciar Cerro Castillo.

waypoints.name: Paso Cerro Castillo
waypoints.note: Full panoramic view of the castle from above. Best photography point.

waypoints.name: General Carrera Lake
waypoints.note: World's second largest lake in South America. Marble Caves nearby.
